name: Lagk-te-sa ("Cat's Tongues")
recipeInstructions:
Cream the butter with sugar. Add vanilla and egg whites, and beat well.
Add flour, and mix it in well. Put dough into cookie press and press thru
wide round opening to make pencil-shaped cookies. Place them, far apart, on
a cold, buttered cookie sheet. Bake in preheated 400°F oven for 7 to 8 minutes.
Watch carefully to prevent their burning.
